# Synzephyr Technologies — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

> Synzephyr Technologies is a digital marketing agency based in Pollachi, Tamil Nadu, India.
> We help local businesses grow online through SEO, Google Business Profile optimization,
> social media marketing, and graphic design services across Pollachi and Coimbatore.

## About

Synzephyr Technologies was founded to bring world-class digital marketing to small and
medium businesses in Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities of Tamil Nadu. Our core belief is that
every local business deserves to be discoverable online.

## Services

- SEO Services in Pollachi: https://synzephyrtechnologies.web.app/seo-services-pollachi
- SEO Services in Coimbatore: https://synzephyrtechnologies.web.app/seo-services-coimbatore
- Digital Marketing in Pollachi: https://synzephyrtechnologies.web.app/digital-marketing-pollachi
- Digital Marketing in Coimbatore: https://synzephyrtechnologies.web.app/digital-marketing-coimbatore
- Google Business Profile Setup: https://synzephyrtechnologies.web.app/google-business-profile-setup-pollachi
- Graphic Design Services: https://synzephyrtechnologies.web.app/graphic-design-services-pollachi
